scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=packages/tui && npm run build --workspace=packages/core && npm run build --workspace=packages/engine && npm run build --workspace=packages/cli
scripts.dev: concurrently --names "core,engine,cli,tui" --prefix-colors "cyan,yellow,red,magenta" "cd packages/core && npm run dev" "cd packages/engine && npm run dev" "cd packages/cli && npm run dev" "cd packages/tui && npm run dev"
scripts.check: biome check --write --error-on-warnings . && tsc --noEmit -p configs/tsconfig.release.json && npm run check:browser-smoke
scripts.check:ci: biome ci . && tsc --noEmit -p configs/tsconfig.release.json && npm run check:browser-smoke
scripts.version:patch: npm version patch -ws --no-git-tag-version && node tools/scripts/sync-versions.js && shx rm -rf node_modules packages/*/node_modules package-lock.json && npm install
scripts.version:minor: npm version minor -ws --no-git-tag-version && node tools/scripts/sync-versions.js && shx rm -rf node_modules packages/*/node_modules package-lock.json && npm install
scripts.version:major: npm version major -ws --no-git-tag-version && node tools/scripts/sync-versions.js && shx rm -rf node_modules packages/*/node_modules package-lock.json && npm install
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run clean && npm run build && npm run check
scripts.publish: npm run prepublishOnly && npm publish -ws --access public
scripts.publish:dry: npm run prepublishOnly && npm publish -ws --access public --dry-run
